prompt: Premium typographic logo on solid black background. The text 'MM AGENCY.' in a single horizontal line, all uppercase. 'MM' is in bold heavy weight dark navy blue (#1B3A5C), and 'AGENCY.' is in a warm burnt orange (#D4662A) at a slightly lighter weight. The period/dot at the end is also in the orange. The typeface is a clean modern geometric sans-serif with wide proportions — similar to Montserrat Bold or Gilroy Bold. Generous letter-spacing between all characters. The weight difference between MM (extra bold) and AGENCY (medium bold) creates visual hierarchy. No icon, no symbol, no graphic element — pure typography only. The logo sits perfectly centered on the black canvas. The two-tone color split gives it a premium agency feel similar to Caribe Media branding. Vector sharp, razor clean edges, flat design, no shadows, no gradients, no 3D effects. Professional brand identity.
negative_prompt: icon, symbol, graphic element, shield, mask, illustration, 3D, gradient, shadow, glow, neon, complex, busy, decorative, ornamental, serif font, script font, handwritten, rough texture, grunge, noise, blur, low quality, pixelated, realistic photo, photography, human, colorful rainbow, multiple colors beyond the two brand colors, cyan, green, purple
